name: Web UI redesign & search
objective: Claude-designed visual overhaul of the MkDocs GitHub Pages site plus an upgraded search experience; hosting stays GitHub Pages. Absorbs deferred D2 (design polish) — promote it into this phase at decomposition.

review.note: Full-phase validation green (build exit 0, site_smoke PASS, marker round-trip byte-for-byte, state integrity clean); intent conformance confirmed, no scope creep; operator-designed system live, CJK search browser-only, deploy-gating guard in CI; 6 durable doc versions consolidated (frontend/experience/qa first real truth; decisions/operations/architecture updated). Visual acceptance stays with the operator before push.
